name: Air New Zealand Limited
analysis: AIZ's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.3725, stop A$0.3317, target A$0.4950 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
